dct_title_s: New York City Predicted Ozone Surface, Summer 2012
dct_description_sm: New York City Predicted Ozone Surface, Summer 2012 is a raster dataset representing estimated levels of Ozone in New York City in June through August of 2012. The resolution is approximately 300 meters and the units are parts per billion. This dataset was generated for the air pollution rasters dataset on NYC Open Data at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Environment/NYCCAS-Air-Pollution-Rasters/q68s-8qxv/about_data in May of 2026. Columbia Libraries has made this available in GeoTIFF format in State Plane Coordinates. Original documentation can be found in the full download package.
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
dct_rightsHolder_sm: Center for International Earth Science Information Network
